case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. JOSE DE JESUS ULLOA ULLOA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DE JESUS ULLOA ULLOA, JOSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
